name: Vibration Notch Filter Tuning
description:
You are an Agricultural Technician who has just built a custom 16-liter heavy-lift spray drone. During its initial hover test, frame vibrations from the massive propellers aliased into the flight controller's gyroscopes, causing severe motor heating and altitude-hold instability. Using the FFT analysis report located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/fft_analysis_report.txt, configure the drone's harmonic notch filter parameters in QGroundControl. 

Configure the following parameters based on the report's engineering recommendations and data: INS_HNTCH_ENABLE, INS_HNTCH_MODE, INS_HNTCH_FREQ, INS_HNTCH_BW, INS_HNTCH_REF, INS_HNTCH_ATT, and INS_LOG_BAT_OPT. The filter bandwidth (INS_HNTCH_BW) must be calculated as exactly 50% of the center frequency found in the report. 

Save a configuration summary to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/filter_summary.txt. This file must include the final Frequency, Bandwidth, and Reference Thrust values used, along with the exact confirmation phrase: 'Ready for post-filter test flight'.
